claims.quote: UAB offers competitive and rewarding jobs for a wide array of applicants. Choose the job listings that best fit your role and goals:UAB Faculty CareersUAB Staff CareersUAB Medicine CareersUAB Student Jobs Opens an external link.UAB Temporary JobsUAB Internal Careers Opens an external link.UA System Careers Opens an external link.
claims.claimText: UAB careers portal lists Faculty Careers, Staff Careers, UAB Medicine Careers, Student Jobs, Temporary Jobs, Internal Careers, and UA System Careers categories.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is the UAB HR careers landing page enumerating faculty, staff, and UAB Medicine career tracks — Tier 3 attending/faculty/staff jobs.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Executive Candidate SearchUAB boasts some of the best leaders anywhere in the nation. Be a part of our team and help shape the future of the institution.
claims.claimText: UAB advertises an Executive Candidate Search for leadership recruitment.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Executive/leadership candidate search is a Tier 3 post-training career recruitment signal.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: UAB Human Resources contact phone number listed as (205) 934-5321.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: HR contact on a careers portal supports Tier 3 careers/jobs inquiries.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Talent AcquisitionUAB Human Resources provides support to hiring managers looking to recruit top talent to their teams.
claims.claimText: UAB HR provides Talent Acquisition support to hiring managers.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Talent acquisition support is part of post-training careers infrastructure.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: From health insurance, flexible spending accounts and retirement plans to medical leaves and life insurance, UAB offers a comprehensive suite of health and retirement benefits to all benefit-eligible employees.
claims.claimText: UAB offers a comprehensive benefits suite (health insurance, FSAs, retirement, medical leaves, life insurance) to benefit-eligible employees.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic employee benefits page describing health/retirement/life insurance for benefit-eligible employees — Tier 3 post-trainee practice/career resource.
claims.limitations: University-wide HR benefits page; not physician-specific and not USCE-relevant.

claims.claimText: Benefits include medical leaves and life insurance.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Life insurance / leave references are Tier 3 post-trainee benefits/services content.
claims.limitations: Snippet only; no detail on disability coverage or eligibility specifics.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: UAB provides employees with a variety of perks and resources to support you at home and at work.
claims.claimText: UAB markets employee perks and resources beyond traditional benefits.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: General employee perks language is Tier 3 career/benefits context.

claims.claimText: Page is university HR benefits content under unknown scope; cannot be attributed specifically to UAB Hospital campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: University-wide HR domain (uab.edu) cannot be auto-attributed to the UAB Hospital institution without campus-applicability proof.
claims.limitations: Prompt-supplied scope is UNKNOWN_SCOPE; deepSourceHint family BENEFITS confirmed by content.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: Affirmative Action and EEOC PoliciesUAB is an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action EmployerLearn More
claims.claimText: UAB declares itself an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer with EEOC policies on the careers landing page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: EEO/AA employer attestation is a Tier 3 hiring/employment policy signal pertinent to physicians and staff applying.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on job-category list and contact info; missed the explicit EEO/AA employer policy block lower in the page.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only
